options.name: --host
options.description: ES Host to connect to. Default: http://127.0.0.1:9200/

options.name: --proxy
options.description: HTTP proxy to use for ES connections

options.name: --parallelism
options.description: Max number of parallel requests, default: 6

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter to apply. This is a query string query

options.name: --include-id
options.description:
Includes the ID of documents. If set, the document data
moves to 'doc'

options.name: --include-index
options.description:
Includes the Index of documents. If set, the document data
moves to 'doc'
